vulnerabilities.description: Missing Helmet middleware for enhanced security headers
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement Helmet middleware in your Express app to set security-related HTTP headers.

vulnerabilities.description: CORS configuration is missing with a specific whitelist
vulnerabilities.fix: Configure CORS middleware with a whitelist of allowed origins to prevent resource sharing from untrusted sources.

vulnerabilities.description: Rate limiting is not implemented to prevent abuse
vulnerabilities.fix: Add a rate-limiting middleware to control the number of requests per time period.
